feedback_text:
DIAGNOSIS: The content has strong technical accuracy and accessibility but loses significant points on word count (2.8 points) and missing architectural context for Q/K/V origins (4.2 points). The Instagram analogy and progressive structure work well and should be preserved while making targeted cuts for concision.

DO NOT CHANGE (these sections are passing):
  ✓ expl_accuracy.attention_math: Strong technical explanation of dot products and softmax
  ✓ expl_accuracy.multihead_purpose: Good concrete examples of different head specializations
  ✓ expl_accessibility.jargon_handling: All technical terms properly explained
  ✓ expl_accessibility.analogy_quality: Instagram analogy maps correctly and is memorable
  ✓ expl_accessibility.progressive_complexity: Clear scaffolding from familiar to technical
  ✓ expl_engagement.hook: Effective phone autocomplete opening
  ✓ expl_engagement.tone: Conversational and respectful throughout

REQUIRED FIXES (ordered by point impact):

  FIX 1: expl_accuracy.qkv_correctness (current: 25%, 4.2 pts at stake)
    Failed check: Mentions that queries come from decoder, keys/values from encoder (or all from same sequence in self-attention)
    Expected: Explanation of where Q/K/V originate in the architecture
    Found: Not found in content
    → ACTION: Add one sentence explaining that 'In self-attention (like in GPT), all queries, keys, and values come from the same input sequence, while in cross-attention, queries come from the decoder and keys/values from the encoder.'

  FIX 2: expl_engagement.concision (current: 0%, 2.8 pts at stake)
    Failed check: Total word count between 400-600 words
    Expected: Content should be ≤600 words for full points
    Found: Content estimated at ~650-700 words
    → ACTION: Cut the content to exactly 600 words or fewer by removing redundant phrases, combining similar sentences, and eliminating any repetitive explanations while preserving all core technical concepts and analogies.
